reason: Enabling the Dracut FIPS module requires modifying initramfs and adding the kernel boot parameter fips=1. On an already‑installed RHEL 9 system this is unsupported and can prevent the system from booting, causing a loss of access. The policy explicitly classifies FIPS‑related boot changes as too dangerous to remediate automatically.
estimated_impact: reboot required; Potential boot failure; Loss of console/SSH access; System may become unbootable; Compliance impact if not resolved
